caption: In a medical simulation setting, a person wearing a blue surgical gown and mask stands over a patient mannequin covered in blue sterile drapes. They use a hand-held ultrasound probe on the mannequin's neck, with a monitor nearby displaying the imaging. Another person, also in blue surgical attire, is positioned to the left, assisting with the procedure. In the background, a third person in pink scrubs and a mask observes. Large white text reading "Sim Week" appears across the center of the scene, and a logo in the bottom right corner says "Sim Week" followed by smaller text stating "STUDENT TRANSITION TO RESIDENCY". As the sequence progresses, the text "A Week in the Life of a Surgical Intern Student Transition to Residency" appears below "Sim Week". The personnel remain in their positions, focused on the simulation task as the on-screen text overlays evolve.
